svg.title: Case-level quality-only matrix
svg.desc: Per-case quality judge deltas for selected pass/pass comparisons.
svg.text: Per-case judge deltas. Only pass/pass comparisons are shown; blanks mean a hard gate failed on at least one side.
Columns are left minus right: GPT/empty, GLM/empty, GLM/GPT, Grok Build/GPT, Current/OpenHands, Current/Fable.
Cell value is current/candidate score minus baseline score. Positive values favor the left side in the column header.
Source: selected quality.json pair reports filtered to both sides passed
